scholarships.title: CHED UniFAST Scholarship Program
scholarships.description: The Unified Financial Assistance System for Tertiary Education (UniFAST) provides financial assistance to deserving students pursuing undergraduate degrees in state universities and colleges.
scholarships.eligibility: All undergraduate students with GPA of 2.5 or higher
requirements: Must be a Filipino citizen
Currently enrolled in PUP Parañaque Campus
General Weighted Average (GWA) of at least 2.5
Family income not exceeding ₱400,000 per year
No pending scholarship from other government agencies
documents: Income Tax Return (ITR) or Certificate of Income
process: Download and complete the application form from the CHED website
Submit all required documents to the Student Affairs Office
Wait for initial screening and verification
Attend interview if shortlisted
Await final approval notification

scholarships.title: Parañaque City Government Academic Scholarship
scholarships.description: A merit-based scholarship program provided by the Parañaque City Government to support academically excellent students who are residents of Parañaque City.
requirements: Must be a bonafide resident of Parañaque City for at least 2 years
Included in the Dean's List or Honor Roll
General Weighted Average (GWA) of 1.75 or higher
Enrolled in at least 15 units for the semester
No failing grades in any subject
documents: Original copy of grades (Certified True Copy)
Certificate of Dean's List from the University Registrar
Valid ID with photo and signature
process: Secure application form from Parañaque City Hall Education Office
Complete all requirements and compile documents
Submit application to the City Education Office
Attend orientation seminar (if required)
Receive scholarship grant notification

scholarships.title: SM Foundation College Scholarship
scholarships.description: SM Foundation offers educational assistance to financially challenged but deserving students through its college scholarship program, covering tuition fees and providing monthly allowances.
scholarships.eligibility: Financially disadvantaged students with GPA of 85% or higher
requirements: Filipino citizen from a low-income family
General average of at least 85% or GWA of 2.0
Family gross income not exceeding ₱300,000 annually
Must not be a recipient of other scholarship programs with similar benefits
Good moral character and no record of disciplinary actions
documents: Completed SM Foundation scholarship application form
Copy of grades from previous semester
Certificate of Enrollment for current semester
Income Tax Return (ITR) or Certificate of No Income
Essay on why you deserve the scholarship (300 words)
process: Visit SM Foundation website and create an account
Fill out online application form
Upload all required documents in PDF format
Submit application before deadline
Wait for screening results and interview schedule
Attend final interview if shortlisted

scholarships.title: PUP Parañaque Merit-Based Scholarship
scholarships.description: An internal scholarship program recognizing outstanding academic performance of students enrolled at PUP Parañaque Campus. This scholarship covers full or partial tuition fees.
scholarships.eligibility: Top 10% of class with no failing grades
requirements: Must be enrolled in at least 15 units
Ranked within the top 10% of the class
No failing or incomplete grades
General Weighted Average of 1.5 or better
Active participation in campus activities
documents: List of organizational involvement or achievements
One recommendation letter from a faculty member
process: Obtain application form from the Office of Student Affairs
Submit completed form with all supporting documents
Undergo initial evaluation by the Scholarship Committee
Attend interview (if required)
Receive notification of scholarship award

scholarships.title: DOST-SEI Scholarship for STEM Students
scholarships.provider: Department of Science and Technology - Science Education Institute
scholarships.description: DOST-SEI provides full scholarships to students pursuing degrees in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) fields to develop future scientists and innovators.
scholarships.eligibility: STEM students with strong academic records
requirements: Must be enrolled in a STEM-related program (BSIT, BS Computer Science)
General Weighted Average of 2.0 or better
Filipino citizen
Family gross income not exceeding ₱500,000 per year
Willing to serve the country after graduation
documents: Income Tax Return or Certificate of Income
Two letters of recommendation from teachers
process: Register on the DOST-SEI online portal
Complete the online application form
Upload all required documents
Take the DOST-SEI scholarship exam
Attend panel interview if qualified
Sign scholarship contract upon approval

scholarships.title: Megaworld Foundation Scholarship
scholarships.description: Megaworld Foundation extends educational support to underprivileged but deserving students through a comprehensive scholarship program with monthly stipends.
scholarships.eligibility: Undergraduate students with financial need and good academic standing
requirements: Must be enrolled in any undergraduate program at PUP Parañaque
From a family with an annual income of ₱250,000 or less
General Weighted Average of 2.25 or higher
Active involvement in community service or extracurricular activities
No record of disciplinary violations
documents: Completed application form (available from foundation website)
Latest report card or transcript of records
Proof of family income (ITR, pay slips, or affidavit)
One recommendation letter from a teacher or community leader
process: Download application form from Megaworld Foundation website
Complete form and gather all required documents
Submit complete application to the foundation office or via email
Wait for initial screening results (2-3 weeks)
Attend interview and home visit if shortlisted
Receive scholarship award decision
